# kian.coffee

> Personal site for Kian Alikhani — full-stack IC architect at Mastercard.
> Career arc, side projects, homelab, and current focus, structured so an
> LLM or a recruiter can understand the shape of the work in one pass.

This site is the long-form complement to the CV at
`projects/kian-coffee/docs/cv.md` in the kian.sh repo. All narrative below
is paraphrased from that CV or derived from public repository state; nothing
here is invented.

## Pages

- [Home](https://kian.coffee/): Entry point. Hero, currently-at strip, featured work, selected projects, lab teaser.
- [Work](https://kian.coffee/work): Career timeline across Mastercard (Lead + Senior), Conseqta Technology, and IBM Watson.
- [Projects](https://kian.coffee/projects): Side projects grouped by theme — bare-metal infrastructure, AI as a tool, apps shipped from the homelab.
- [Lab](https://kian.coffee/lab): The homelab — three Talos Kubernetes clusters on Proxmox, GitOps via ArgoCD, self-hosted observability, live node inventory. Includes two inline-SVG architecture diagrams.
- [Uses](https://kian.coffee/uses): Editor, daily-driver hardware, homelab hardware, infra toolbelt, coffee setup.
- [Now](https://kian.coffee/now): Date-stamped snapshot of current focus.
- [Contact](https://kian.coffee/contact): Email, LinkedIn, GitHub.

## About Kian

- **Role:** Lead Software Engineer at Mastercard (2023 – present), previously Senior Software Engineer (2020 – 2023).
- **Shape:** Full-stack IC architect. Generalist across frontend, backend, data, and platform.
- **Prior:** Software Engineer at Conseqta Technology (2019 – 2020), SWE Intern at IBM Watson (Summer 2018).
- **Education:** B.S. Computer Science, Case Western Reserve University (2018).
- **Location:** Arlington, VA.

## Notable Work (from the CV)

- Real-time, event-driven data pipeline on Kafka + Spark + Hadoop processing millions of transactions per hour; concept to production in three months.
- Enterprise design system + UI library adopted across seven global programs and twenty-plus engineering teams.
- AI-first SDLC/PDLC foundations — MCP servers, reusable skills, knowledge-base standardization — as core member of a CTO-led task force.
- RBAC unification across fifteen microservices.
- Modernization to micro-frontend architecture.
- Retry + circuit-breaker patterns for burst-traffic resilience.

## Homelab

- Three Talos Kubernetes clusters: core, dev, prod. Nine cluster nodes total.
- Three bare-metal HP EliteDesks running prod; Proxmox hypervisors hosting core and dev VMs.
- GitOps via ArgoCD + GitHub Actions; image tags are auto-promoted through a dispatch-driven flow.
- Self-hosted LGTM observability stack (Grafana, Loki, Tempo, Mimir) with Grafana Alloy on every host.
- CNPG for Postgres, Dragonfly for KV, Envoy Gateway + cert-manager + external-dns at the edge.
- Source: [github.com/TechGardenCode/kian.sh](https://github.com/TechGardenCode/kian.sh).

## Optional

- [Source for this site](https://github.com/TechGardenCode/kian-coffee): Angular 21 prerendered to static HTML, served by nginx behind Envoy Gateway + Cloudflare. Tailwind v4, self-hosted fonts, inline-SVG diagrams.
- [llms-full.txt](https://kian.coffee/llms-full.txt): Longer-form version with more context.
